manifests.contents:
[package]
name = "ssu_mgmt"
edition = "2021"
version = "0.0.1"

[dependencies]
aws-sdk-guardduty = "^1"
aws-sdk-s3 = "^1"
base64 = "0.22.1"
crossbeam = "0.8.2"
csv = "^1.3"
diesel_migrations = "^2.2"
flate2 = "^1"
flume = "0.11.0"
futures = "^0.3"
jwt-authorizer = "^0.14"
log = "^0.4"
maxminddb = "^0.24"
mime_guess = "^2.0"
native-tls = "^0.2"
postgres = "^0.19"
postgres-native-tls = "^0.5"
r2d2 = "^0.8"
regex = "1.10.4"
rust-embed = "^8.4.0"
serde_json = "^1"
serde_yaml = "^0.9"
thiserror = "^1"
tokio-util = "^0.7"
tower-layer = "0.3.2"
tracing = "^0.1"

[dependencies.anyhow]
version = "^1"
features = ["backtrace"]

[dependencies.aws-config]
version = "^1"
features = ["behavior-version-latest"]

[dependencies.axum]
version = "^0.7"
features = ["macros", "ws"]

[dependencies.axum-extra]
version = "^0.9"
features = ["cookie", "query"]

[dependencies.chrono]
version = "0.4.24"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.config]
version = "^0.13"
features = ["yaml"]

[dependencies.dashmap]
version = "6.0.1"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.diesel]
version = "^2.2"
features = ["postgres", "chrono", "serde_json", "r2d2"]

[dependencies.pprof]
version = "^0.13"
features = ["flamegraph", "protobuf-codec"]

[dependencies.rdkafka]
version = "0.39.0"
features = ["cmake-build", "ssl-vendored", "gssapi-vendored"]

[dependencies.reqwest]
version = "^0.12"
features = ["json"]

[dependencies.seqtf_bootstrap]
version = "0.1.12"
registry = "seqtf"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "^1.0"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "^1.28"
features = ["full"]

[dependencies.tower-http]
version = "^0.5"
features = ["trace"]

[dependencies.uuid]
version = "^1"
features = ["v4"]

[build-dependencies.vergen]
version = "8.1.3"
features = ["build", "git", "gitcl"]

[target.'cfg(not(target_env = "msvc"))'.dependencies]
tikv-jemallocator = "^0.6"

[target.'cfg(not(target_env = "msvc"))'.dev-dependencies]

[target.'cfg(not(target_env = "msvc"))'.build-dependencies]

[[bin]]
path = "src/main.rs"
name = "ssu_mgmt"
edition = "2021"
required-features = []
